homepage.title: Industrial Flow Meters Australia | FLOMEC
homepage.description: FLOMEC Flow Meters are an Australian manufacturer of precision flow meters including oval gear, turbine, ultrasonic & electromagnetic models. Certified, reliable & globally trusted.

performance you can rely on
FLOMEC®
products are designed, engineered, and made in Australia and the United States. These products have globally recognised certifications like NMI, ATEX, FM and IECEx to keep the operation of critical infrastructure safe.

Common Installation Mistakes That Compromise Oval Gear Flow Meter Performance
When installation requirements are ignored, problems such as reduced accuracy, erratic output, accelerated wear, or catastrophic mechanical failure can occur. In many cases, these issues are incorrectly attributed to the meter itself when the root cause lies in avoidable installation errors.
Read now
Selecting The Right Flowmeter - Top 7 Considerations
There are a host of considerations when selecting a flowmeter such as cost, brand, technology, installation requirements, application, the list goes on...
To help narrow down the answer to these questions, we’ve compiled a list of the
Top 7 Considerations for Choosing a Flowmeter.
Once you understand these requirements, the considerations mentioned above will become clearer and the potential field of products narrowed.
Read now

about flomec
A Commitment to Quality
At Flomec Flowmeters, we specialise in providing high-quality flow measurement solutions for a wide range of industries. With years of experience and a commitment to innovation, we have become a trusted name in the field of flow measurement.
At the core of our philosophy is a dedication to precision, reliability, and customer satisfaction. We understand that accurate flow measurement is essential for the success of many industrial processes, and we strive to deliver products that meet the highest standards of performance and durability.
Quality Products
We take pride in our extensive range of flow measurement products, which are designed to cater to various applications and industries. Our flowmeters are built using state-of-the-art technology and undergo rigorous testing to ensure their accuracy and reliability. Whether you need a simple inline flowmeter or a sophisticated ultrasonic flowmeter, we have a solution that fits your requirements.
Industry Expertise
Our team consists of experienced professionals who possess in-depth knowledge of flow measurement and its applications across different industries. We understand the unique challenges faced by our customers and are committed to providing tailored solutions that meet their specific needs. From oil and gas to water treatment, pharmaceuticals to food and beverage, our flow measurement expertise spans a wide range of sectors.
Customer Focus
At Flomec Flowmeters, we prioritise our customers' needs above all else. Building long-term relationships based on trust, reliability, and exceptional customer service is in our DNA. Our dedicated support team is always ready to assist you with any questions or concerns you may have. We strive to provide prompt and efficient technical support, ensuring that your flow measurement systems operate at their optimum performance.
Innovation and Continuous Improvement
We are committed to staying at the forefront of flow measurement technology. Through continuous research and development, we aim to enhance the accuracy, efficiency, and functionality of our products. By embracing innovation, we seek to provide our customers with cutting-edge solutions that help them optimise their processes and achieve their goals.
Partnerships and Collaboration
We value collaboration and actively seek partnerships with other industry leaders, research institutions, and technology providers. By working together, we can pool our expertise and resources to develop innovative solutions that address the evolving needs of our customers.
Choose Flomec Flowmeters
When it comes to flow measurement, Flomec Flowmeters is your trusted partner. With our commitment to quality, expertise, customer focus, and innovation, we aim to provide you with the most reliable and accurate flow measurement solutions available in the market. Contact us today to learn more about our products and how we can help you achieve your flow measurement goals.
OUR HISTORY
Innovation is in our DNA
FLOMEC® stands as the foremost brand proudly manufactured by Great Plains Industries Australia, formerly known as Trimec Industries Pty Ltd. With a global presence, FLOMEC has earned a reputation for unparalleled quality, performance, and unwavering reliability in liquid measurement.
Origins rooted in Excellence
Established in 1989 as Trimec Industries Pty Ltd, our company embarked on a journey of ingenuity, introducing the groundbreaking MP piston meter as our inaugural meter technology. Continuing our commi
